description: Legal document of ḥaliṣa (release from levirate marriage). In Aramaic. There is also one line in Arabic script on verso. Location: Fustat. Dated: 137[.] Seleucid, which is 1058–68 CE. The woman is Sitt [...] bt. Yosef, the widow of Barakāt (her name appears three lines from the bottom).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
